old_value.description: Confidence score. Must remain 0.0-1.0 float. BREAKING if changed to 0-100.

changes.description: Add non-nullable column — coordinate with all producers

migration_checklist: 1. Update downstream consumers for field 'fact_confidence': Range change maximum 1.0 -> 100.0
2. Update downstream consumers for field 'quality_flag': Add non-nullable column — coordinate with all producers
3. Update downstream consumers for field 'source_hash': Remove column — deprecation period mandatory

2. Revert field 'quality_flag' to previous state: null
3. Revert field 'source_hash' to previous state: {"type": "string", "required": true, "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$", "description": "SHA-256 hash."}
